title: Marvell Technology Earnings Dates and Analysis
text: Marvell Technology reported fiscal 2026 earnings with record annual revenue of $8.195 billion, growing 42% year-over-year, driven by strong demand for AI infrastructure products. Q4 FY2026 results included revenue of $2.22 billion and adjusted EPS of $0.80, both exceeding expectations. Data center revenue segment reached $6.05 billion, representing 46% year-over-year growth and accounting for 74% of total revenue. Custom silicon business doubled to $1.5 billion in fiscal 2026. The company provided forward guidance for FY2027 revenue approaching $11 billion, implying 35% year-over-year growth, and FY2028 revenue near $15 billion, implying 36% growth. Management emphasized accelerating sequential growth each quarter in fiscal 2027. Analyst ratings remain predominantly bullish with Strong Buy consensus. Key investment themes include exposure to AI training and inference infrastructure, custom silicon growth, and optical interconnect scaling.
